CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.OBS_Last_Zoom__c)), ISBLANK(Account__r.OBC_Last_Zoom__c) ), Account__r.OBS_Last_Zoom__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.OBS_Last_Zoom__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.OBC_Last_Zoom__c)) ), Account__r.OBC_Last_Zoom__c, IF( Account__r.OBS_Last_Zoom__c > Account__r.OBC_Last_Zoom__c, Account__r.OBS_Last_Zoom__c, Account__r.OBC_Last_Zoom__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Last Onboarding Zoom
